meta_title: For Founders: analytics setup to Solve no coding experience (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Analytics Setup for Founders: Overcome No-Code Barriers
content.seo_description: Master analytics setup without coding skills. Use this advanced checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to drive SaaS growth and data-backed decisions.
content.answer_block: You don't need to be a developer to master data. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for implementation, you can deploy enterprise-grade event tracking. This approach transforms raw user behavior into actionable revenue metrics, allowing you to iterate your SaaS product based on real-world usage patterns.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'gut feelings.' Without robust analytics, you are flying blind, unable to distinguish between a feature that delights users and one that drives churn. For the non-technical founder, the barrier to implementation has historically been the daunting wall of code. 

But the era of the AI-augmented builder has arrived. You no longer need to hire a pricey engineer to instrument your stack. By unifying your business logic with intelligent automation, you can turn your MVP into a precision-engineered machine that reports exactly where your revenue leaks are occurring.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metrics
steps.description: Before touching code, identify the three events that equate to revenue: Signup, Activation, and Subscription. We need to map these to your specific user journey.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data schema for a SaaS product tracking user signup, onboarding completion, and subscription purchase. Include properties for user_id, source, and session_duration.

steps.title: Initialize the Analytics Provider
steps.description: We will use a headless analytics approach to ensure your data remains portable and compliant with privacy regulations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight provider wrapper for PostHog or Segment that handles event buffering and batching to minimize API overhead.

steps.title: Implement Event Hooks
steps.description: Inject tracking triggers into your existing frontend components without manually editing thousands of lines of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a decorator pattern for tracking frontend interactions. Apply this to the 'Submit' button and 'Upgrade' CTA components.

steps.title: Enable User Identification
steps.description: Associate anonymous traffic with specific user accounts to track the full lifecycle from lead to high-value customer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a function that maps authenticated user session tokens to analytics profile identifiers upon login.

steps.title: Validate Data Pipeline
steps.description: Run an automated simulation to ensure events are firing correctly and reaching the dashboard before launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite that triggers 50 simulated user events and verifies that the analytics dashboard reflects these inputs.

pro_tips: Never track everything. Focus on high-intent events; vanity metrics only increase your cloud costs and clutter your decision-making.
Implement server-side tracking for critical financial events to bypass ad-blockers and browser-based tracking prevention.
Use 'User Properties' to segment your audience by plan tier, allowing you to analyze behavior differences between free and paid users.
Automate a weekly alert that sends your top three metrics directly to your Slack workspace; don't wait for your dashboard to tell you when things break.
Tag your marketing attribution early; if you don't know which channel brought a user, you cannot scale your acquisition effectively.
resources: Analytics Best Practices for SaaS: https://segment.com/academy
content.next_steps: Once your pipeline is live, set up a cohort analysis report in your dashboard to track 30-day retention. If retention is below 20%, return to the Antigravity prompt library to optimize your onboarding flow.
content.conversion_block: Your data is your greatest competitive advantage. Stop guessing and start scaling with a foundation that works as hard as you do. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
